# UDGOK — Upscale Development Group

> AI-Powered Medical & Dental Design-Build Construction

## About

Upscale Development Group (UDGOK) is a licensed Oklahoma general contractor specializing in healthcare and commercial Design-Build construction. Founded in 2015 and headquartered in Tulsa, Oklahoma, UDGOK delivers turnkey medical offices, dental clinics, oral surgery centers, eye clinics, and commercial facilities across Oklahoma and North Texas.

## Contact

- Website: https://udgok.com
- Email: projects@udgok.com
- Phone: (918) 520-3823
- Address: 7739 E 38th Street, Ste F, Tulsa, OK 74145

## Core Services

- [Medical Office Design-Build](https://udgok.com/medical-office-design-build-tulsa)
- [Dental Office Construction](https://udgok.com/dental-office-construction-tulsa)
- [Oral Surgery Center Construction](https://udgok.com/oral-surgeon-office-construction-tulsa)
- [Eye Clinic Construction](https://udgok.com/eye-clinic-construction-tulsa)
- [Medical Gas Installation](https://udgok.com/medical-gas-installation)
- [Commercial Tenant Improvements](https://udgok.com/tenant-improvements)
- [Design-Build Delivery](https://udgok.com/design-build)
- [Virtual Design & Construction (VDC/BIM)](https://udgok.com/virtual-design-construction)
- [Preconstruction Services](https://udgok.com/preconstruction)
- [Safety Program](https://udgok.com/safety-program)
- [Project Management (PMP-Led)](https://udgok.com/project-management-pmp-led)
- [Permitting & Code Compliance](https://udgok.com/permitting-and-code-compliance)
